segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Morning. I'm Jongkuk. I just moved in upstairs.

segments.speaker: Neighbor
segments.text: Oh nice, welcome to the building. I'm Rachel.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Nice to meet you. I'm still learning my way around.

segments.speaker: Neighbor
segments.text: You picked a good area. Pretty quiet, but close to everything.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: That's good to hear. Is there a decent grocery store within walking distance?

segments.speaker: Neighbor
segments.text: Yeah, about ten minutes that way. There's also a smaller market around the corner.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Great. And is the elevator usually this slow, or is today special?

segments.speaker: Neighbor
segments.text: Honestly, it's always a little dramatic.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Good to know. I'll build that into my schedule.
